revisions.what_changed: Full M16 workshop: 8 Danilo content tabs + 1 bonus (507) consolidated into 7 production files. Content strategy, SEO strategy, keyword research, pillar/cluster content model, link building + native ads, technical SEO checklist, content repurposing system. HARO replaced with current alternatives (Qwoted, Featured.com). YMYL/E-E-A-T infrastructure added. Publishing cadence calibrated with Founder Mode tier. Google Merchant Center gap closed. Native ads phase-gated as optional.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong: research-grounded, realistic timelines, actionable content, 8-round persona dialogue with 5 material upgrades. Limited by: unverified keyword volumes, no competitor backlink data, no CWV data for Shopify theme. Pre-launch planning — execution will determine final quality.

next_action: Verify keyword volumes with Google Keyword Planner / Ubersuggest post-launch. Run PageSpeed Insights after Shopify theme selection. Publish first blog post (Complete Guide to Electrolytes).

intelligence_gaps.closure: GSC impression data after 1-2 months live
Ahrefs free check on LMNT, AG1, Nuun at Month 3
GA4 data after 3+ months organic traffic

danilo_source_note: 9 content tabs (408-415 + 507) totaling ~225 rows. 408 (GTM) and 409 (Calendar) were thin (5 and 8 rows respectively) — merged into content_strategy.md. 414 (Link Building) and 415 (Native Ads) merged into seo_link_building.md with native ads phase-gated as optional. 507 (Content Repurposing) is from a different numbering range but topically belongs to M16.
